translations.### Design Patterns 的實戰應用紀錄—In WKWebView: ### Practical Application of Design Patterns—In WKWebView with Builder, Strategy & Chain of Responsibility Pattern
translations.### WKWebView 的 Design Patterns 實戰應用場景\n: ### Practical Application Scenarios of Design Patterns in WKWebView
translations.#### Question: 這個場景也可以改用 Chain of Respon: #### Question: Can this scenario also be implemented using the Chain of Responsibility Pattern?
translations.***責任鏈專注在東西進來你有沒有要處理，沒有就 Skip*** *，因此不能處: ***Chain of Responsibility focuses on whether you want to handle the incoming item or skip it*** *, so it should not partially handle or modify the input object before passing it to the next; if that is needed, then it's another [**Interceptor Pattern**](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/7951306/chain-of-responsibility-vs-interceptor){:target="_blank"}.*
translations.**Builder Pattern 建造者模式** `MyWKWebViewCo: **Builder Pattern** `MyWKWebViewConfigurator` -> Encapsulates `MyWKWebViewConfiguration` parameters and construction steps
translations.**Chain of Responsibility Pattern 責任鏈模式*: **Chain of Responsibility Pattern** In `MyWKWebViewController`, the function `func webView(_ webView: WKWebView, decidePolicyFor navigationAction: WKNavigationAction, decisionHandler: @escaping (WKNavigationActionPolicy) -> Void)` calls `headNavigationHandler?.exeute(webView: webView, decidePolicyFor: navigationAction, decisionHandler: decisionHandler)` to execute the chain processing.
translations.**Simple Factory 簡單工廠模式** `MyWKWebViewCo: **Simple Factory Pattern** `MyWKWebViewConfiguratorFactory` -> Encapsulates the creation steps of `MyWKWebViewConfigurator`
translations.**Strategy Pattern 策略模式** `MyWKWebViewCo: **Strategy Pattern** The `webView.configuration.userContentController.addUserScript(XXX)` in `MyWKWebViewController` dispatches the corresponding JS Caller to the appropriate handling strategy.
translations.**在 WKWebView 的實作上就會出現很多判斷或是有的頁面處理跟別人不一樣: **In the implementation of WKWebView, many conditions arise, or some pages need to be handled differently and bypassed:**
translations.**結合前面的 Builder Pattern** `MyWKWebViewCo: **Combine with the previous Builder Pattern** `MyWKWebViewConfigurator` **by exposing `headNavigationActionHandler` as a parameter, allowing external control over the WKWebView's handling requirements and order:**
**Combining with the previous Builder Pattern**, `MyWKWebViewConfigurator` manages the registration of `ScriptMessageStrategy` externally:
translations.**謹慎自己創造模式** ，同前述雖然經典的只有 23 種，但經歷各個領域多年的: **Be cautious when creating your own patterns**. Although there are only 23 classic patterns, many new ones have emerged after years of evolution in various fields. You can first refer to online resources to find suitable patterns (after all, two heads are better than one). If none fit, then propose a new design pattern and try to publish it so people from different fields and contexts can review and refine it together.
translations.*Builder Pattern（建造者模式） 屬於 **創建型** 設計模式，: *Builder Pattern belongs to the **creational** design patterns. It separates the steps and logic of object creation, allowing the user to set parameters step by step and reuse configurations, ultimately creating the target object. Additionally, the same creation steps can produce different object implementations.*
translations.*在 WebView 與 前端頁面的交互中使用。*\n\n: *Used in the interaction between WebView and the front-end page.*
translations.*完整 Demo 專案程式碼會附在文末。*\n\n: *The complete demo project code will be attached at the end of the article.*
translations.*就會進到 WKWebView 找到對應 `Name` 的 `WKScriptM: *It will enter WKWebView to find the corresponding `WKScriptMessageHandler` Class by `Name` and execute the operation.*
translations.*當系統收到網址請求時會經過這個方法讓我們決定是否要允許跳轉，並在結束處理後呼叫: *When the system receives a URL request, it goes through this method to let us decide whether to allow the navigation. After processing, call `decisionHandler(.allow)` or `decisionHandler(.cancel)` to notify the result.*
translations.*策略模式（Strategy Pattern）屬於 **行為型** 設計模式，它: *The Strategy Pattern belongs to **behavioral** design patterns. It abstracts the actual operations, allowing us to implement multiple different operations that can be flexibly swapped based on different scenarios.*
translations.*責任鏈模式（Chain of Responsibility Pattern）屬: *The Chain of Responsibility Pattern is a **behavioral** design pattern that encapsulates object processing operations and links them in a chain structure. The request is passed along the chain until it is handled; the linked operations can be freely combined and reordered.*
translations.*這兩個設計模式同樣是行為型，可以取代；但實際要看需求場景，在這邊是很典型的 S: *Both of these design patterns are behavioral and can be interchangeable; however, the choice depends on the specific scenario. Here, it is a typical Strategy Pattern where WKWebView decides which Strategy to use based on the Name. If the requirement involves possible chained dependencies or recovery relationships between different Strategies—for example, if AStrategy fails, it passes to BStrategy—then the Chain of Responsibility Pattern would be considered.*
translations.*這邊因為我只有 Build for MyWKWebView 的需求，因此沒有再: *Here, since I only need to build for MyWKWebView, I did not further split `MyWKWebViewConfigurator` into multiple protocols (interfaces).*
translations.- **Simple Factory Pattern** `MyWKWebVie:
- **Simple Factory Pattern** `MyWKWebViewConfiguratorFactory` -> Encapsulates the creation steps of `MyWKWebViewConfigurator`

- **Builder Pattern** `MyWKWebViewConfigurator` -> Encapsulates `MyWKWebViewConfiguration` parameters and construction steps

- `MyWKWebViewConfiguration` Injection -> Used by `MyWKWebViewController`

- **Chain of Responsibility Pattern** In `MyWKWebViewController`, the function `func webView(_ webView: WKWebView, decidePolicyFor navigationAction: WKNavigationAction, decisionHandler: @escaping (WKNavigationActionPolicy) -> Void)` calls `headNavigationHandler?.exeute(webView: webView, decidePolicyFor: navigationAction, decisionHandler: decisionHandler)` to execute the chain processing.

- **Strategy Pattern** The `webView.configuration.userContentController.addUserScript(XXX)` in `MyWKWebViewController` dispatches the corresponding JS Caller to the appropriate handling strategy.
translations.- Not the Only Solution\n\n- Not a Unive:
- Not the Only Solution

- Not a Universal Solution

- Do not force-fit; choose the appropriate design pattern based on the type of problem to solve (creation? behavior? structure?) and the goal.

- Avoid drastic changes, as they can cause confusion for future maintainers. Just like language, everyone calls Apple "Apple." If you define it as "Banana," it becomes a special term that requires extra developer effort to understand.

- Avoid using keywords whenever possible. For example, the Factory Pattern is usually named `XXXFactory`; if it is not a factory pattern, this keyword should not be used in the name.

- **Be cautious when creating your own patterns**. Although there are only 23 classic patterns, many new ones have emerged after years of evolution in various fields. You can first refer to online resources to find suitable patterns (after all, two heads are better than one). If none fit, then propose a new design pattern and try to publish it so people from different fields and contexts can review and refine it together.

- Code is ultimately written for human maintenance. As long as it is easy to maintain and extend, using design patterns is not always necessary.

- The team must have a consensus on Design Patterns before using them.

- Design Patterns Can Be Combined with Other Design Patterns

- Getting started with Design Patterns requires continuous practical experience to develop a keen sense of which scenarios are suitable or unsuitable for their application.
translations.- Strategy Pattern: Clearly defined disp:
- Strategy Pattern: Clearly defined dispatch execution strategies with no relation between strategies.

- Chain of Responsibility Pattern: Each implementation determines the execution strategy. If it cannot handle the request, it passes it to the next implementation.
translations.- The operation will be implemented in `:
- The operation will be implemented in `func handle()`. Return `true` if there is further processing, otherwise return `false`.

- `func execute()` is the default chain access implementation. It traverses the entire operation chain starting from here. The default behavior is that when `func handle()` returns `false` (meaning this node cannot handle it), it automatically calls the next `nextHandler`'s `execute()` to continue processing until the end.

translations.1. Setting variables and switches direct:
1. Setting variables and switches directly in the class makes it unclear which ones are for configuration.

2. Directly exposing the WKUserScript variable externally; we want to control the injected JS and only allow specific behaviors to be injected.

3. Unable to control WKScriptMessageHandler registration rules.

4. When initializing similar WebViews, injection parameter rules must be repeatedly written, preventing reuse.

5. Inside the `navigationAction Delegate`, the flow is controlled by variables. Changing or removing steps requires modifying the entire code, which may break the existing workflow.

Here, it is a typical Strategy Pattern where WKWebView decides which Strategy to use based on the Name. If the requirement involves possible chained dependencies or recovery relationships between different Strategies—for example, if AStrategy fails, it passes to BStrategy—then the Chain of Responsibility Pattern would be considered.*
translations.> *Builder Pattern belongs to the **crea: > *Builder Pattern belongs to the **creational** design patterns. It separates the steps and logic of object creation, allowing users to set parameters step by step and reuse configurations, ultimately creating the target object. Additionally, the same creation steps can produce different object implementations.*

The request is passed along the chain until it is handled; the linked operations can be freely combined and reordered.*
translations.> *The Strategy Pattern belongs to **beh: > *The Strategy Pattern is part of **behavioral** design patterns. It abstracts the actual operations, enabling us to implement multiple different operations that can be flexibly switched according to different scenarios.*

translations.Chain of Responsibility Pattern：執行策略是在個別: Chain of Responsibility Pattern: The execution strategy is determined within each individual implementation. If it cannot handle the request, it passes it to the next implementation.
translations.Design Pattern 可以再套 Design Pattern 組合技\n: Design Patterns Can Be Combined with Other Design Patterns
translations.Design Patterns 上手要經過實務不斷地淬鍊，才會越來越有什麼場景適: Getting started with Design Patterns requires continuous practical experience to develop a keen sense of which scenarios are suitable or unsuitable for their application.
translations.Strategy Pattern：已有明確派發執行策略且策略與策略之間沒有關係。: Strategy Pattern: Clearly defined dispatch execution strategies with no relation between strategies.

translations.```css\nvar scriptMessageStrategies: [Sc:
```css
var scriptMessageStrategies: [ScriptMessageStrategy] = []
scriptMessageStrategies.forEach { scriptMessageStrategy in
  webView.configuration.userContentController.add(scriptMessageStrategy, name: type(of: scriptMessageStrategy).identifier)
}
```
translations.`func exeute()` 是預設的鏈訪問實現，會從這邊執行遍歷整個操作鏈，: `func exeute()` is the default chain access implementation. It traverses the entire operation chain starting from here. The default behavior is that when `func handle()` returns `false` (meaning this node cannot handle it), it automatically calls the next `nextHandler`'s `execute()` to continue processing until the end.
translations.`navigationAction Delegate` 內部靠變數控制流程，如果: Inside the `navigationAction Delegate`, the flow is controlled by variables. Changing or removing steps requires modifying the entire code, which may break the existing working flow.
translations.上圖以不同支付方式為例，我們把支付抽象為 `Payment` Protocol: The above diagram uses different payment methods as an example. We abstract payment as a `Payment` Protocol (Interface), and each payment method implements its own version. In the `PaymentContext` (simulating external use), the corresponding Payment instance is created based on the user's chosen payment method, and `pay()` is called uniformly to process the payment.
translations.上圖以製作 Pizza 為例，先將 Pizza 製作的步驟拆成好幾個方法，並宣告: The above diagram uses making Pizza as an example. The steps to make a Pizza are divided into several methods declared in the `PizzaBuilder` Protocol (Interface). `ConcretePizzaBuilder` is the actual object that makes the Pizza, which could be a `Vegetarian PizzaBuilder` or a `Meat PizzaBuilder`. Different Builders may use different ingredients, but they all ultimately `build()` to produce a `Pizza` object.
translations.上圖是以 Tech Support (or OnCall..) 為例，問題物件進: The above diagram uses Tech Support (or OnCall..) as an example. When a problem object arrives, it first goes through `CustomerService`. If they cannot handle it, the issue is passed down to the next level, `Supervisor`. If still unresolved, it continues down to `TechSupport`. Additionally, different chains of responsibility can be formed for different problems. For instance, issues from major clients may start directly with the `Supervisor`. The [Swift UIKit Responder Chain](https://www.appcoda.com.tw/responder-chain/){:target="_blank"} also uses the Chain of Responsibility pattern to respond to user actions in the UI.
translations.不能硬套，需按照要解決問題的類型(創建？行為？結構？)、目的選擇對應的設計模式\: Do not force-fit; choose the appropriate design pattern based on the type of problem to solve (creation? behavior? structure?) and the goal.
translations.不能魔改，魔改容易造成後續維護的人誤會，跟語言一樣大家都用蘋果都叫 Apple，: Avoid drastic changes, as they can cause confusion for future maintainers. Just like language, everyone calls Apple "Apple." If you define it as "Banana," it becomes a special term that requires extra developer effort to understand.
translations.到這邊有朋友可能會想問，那這邊的 Strategy Pattern 可以用 Ch: At this point, some might wonder if the Strategy Pattern here can be replaced by the Chain of Responsibility Pattern?
translations.回到 WKWebView 場景，我們的最終產出物件是 `MyWKWebViewC: Back to the WKWebView scenario, our final output object is `MyWKWebViewConfiguration`. We unify all the variables needed for configuring `WKWebView` into this object and use the Builder Pattern `MyWKWebViewConfigurator` to gradually complete the construction of the Configuration.
translations.團隊要有 Design Patterns 的共識才適合使用\n: The team must have a consensus on Design Patterns before using them.
translations.在我們 WKWebView 的場景中，主要是套用在 `func webView(: In our WKWebView scenario, it is mainly applied in the delegate method `func webView(_ webView: WKWebView, decidePolicyFor navigationAction: WKNavigationAction, decisionHandler: @escaping (WKNavigationActionPolicy) -> Void)`.
translations.多拆了一層也可以更好的使用 Access Control 隔離參數的使用權限，以: Adding an extra layer also allows better use of Access Control to restrict parameter access. In this scenario, we want to inject `WKUserScript` directly into `MyWKWebView`, but we don't want to expose too much freedom for users to inject arbitrarily. Therefore, by combining the Builder Pattern with Swift Access Control, once `MyWKWebView` is placed inside a module, `MyWKWebViewConfigurator` exposes an operation method `func set(disableZoom: Bool)` externally. Internally, when creating `MyWKWebViewConfiguration`, it attaches the `WKUserScript`. All parameters of `MyWKWebViewConfiguration` are immutable from outside and can only be generated through `MyWKWebViewConfigurator`.
translations.如果要 init 差不多的 WebView 需要重複寫注入參數的規則，參數規則無: If you need to init similar WebViews, you have to repeatedly write the injection parameter rules, which cannot be reused.
translations.封裝 iOS WKWebView 時使用到的 Design Patterns 場: Design Patterns Used When Encapsulating iOS WKWebView (Strategy, Chain of Responsibility, Builder).
translations.操作會在 `func handle()` 實現，如果有接下來處理則回傳 `tru: The operation will be implemented in `func handle()`. Return `true` if there is further processing, otherwise return `false`.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"} .
translations.每次講 Design Patterns 之前都要提一下，最經典的 GoF 23: Before discussing Design Patterns, it's important to mention that the classic GoF 23 design patterns were published over 30 years ago (1994). Since then, tools, languages, and software development practices have changed drastically. Many new design patterns have also emerged in different fields. Design Patterns are neither a magic solution nor the only solution. They serve more as a "common language" to apply the right pattern in the right context, reducing collaboration barriers. For example, applying the Strategy Pattern here allows future maintenance and extension to follow the pattern's structure easily. Most design patterns also promote good decoupling, which significantly benefits extensibility and testability.
translations.無法控制 WKScriptMessageHandler 的註冊規則\n: Unable to Control WKScriptMessageHandler Registration Rules
translations.當有了 `MyWKWebViewConfigurator` Builder 之後: After having the `MyWKWebViewConfigurator` Builder, we can create a simple factory to encapsulate and reuse the creation steps.
translations.盡可能避開關鍵字，例如 Factory Pattern 習慣命名為 `XXXFa: Avoid using keywords whenever possible. For example, the Factory Pattern is usually named `XXXFactory`; if it is not a factory pattern, this keyword should not be used in the name.
translations.直接暴露 WKUserScript 變數設定給外部，我們希望能管控注入的 JS，: Directly exposing the WKUserScript variable to the outside, we want to control the injected JS and only allow specific behaviors to be injected.
translations.程式終究是寫給人維護的，只要好維護、好擴充，不一定要使用設計模式\n: Code is ultimately written for human maintenance. As long as it is easy to maintain and extend, using design patterns is not always necessary.
translations.系統已經有定義好的 Protocol 跟相應的 `func add(_ scri: The system already defines the Protocol and the corresponding `func add(_ scriptMessageHandler: any WKScriptMessageHandler, name: String)` method. We only need to implement our own `WKScriptMessageHandler` and add it to the WKWebView. The system will then use the Strategy Pattern to dispatch the received `name` to the corresponding concrete strategy for execution.
translations.自從有了 ChatGPT 學習 Design Patterns 設計模式的實務應: Since ChatGPT appeared, learning the practical application of Design Patterns has become easier. Just describe your problem specifically and ask which design patterns suit the scenario. It can provide several possible patterns along with explanations. Although not every answer is perfect, it at least offers feasible directions. We only need to explore these patterns further and combine them with our real-world problems to finally choose a good solution!
translations.複雜場景可以用 Strategy Pattern 裡面再套用 Chain of: Complex scenarios can be achieved by combining the Strategy Pattern with the Chain of Responsibility Pattern inside.
translations.設定變數、開關攤在 Class 當中，不清楚哪些是設定使用\n: Setting variables and switches directly in the class makes it unclear which are for configuration purposes.
translations.這樣當請求收到後，就會照著我們定義的處理鏈依序處理。\n\n: This way, when a request is received, it will be processed sequentially according to the chain we defined.
translations.這次的 Design Patterns 實戰應用是在收斂目前 Codebase: This Design Patterns practical application focuses on consolidating the WKWebView features in the current codebase and sharing insights on applying Design Patterns at several appropriate logical abstraction points when developing a unified WKWebView component.
translations.這邊只做簡單的 Protocol extend `WKScriptMessage: Here, we simply extend the `WKScriptMessageHandler` protocol with an additional `identifier: String` for use in `add(.. name:)`:
translations.隨著時間推移功能越來越複雜，這邊的邏輯也會越來越多，如果又扯到處理順序也要不一樣: As time goes by and features become more complex, the logic here will increase. If the processing order also needs to change, it can become a disaster.
